title: EFU-HSW: Biophysical and Cognitive Flux Auditing of Educational Systems – Research Framework v1.0
author: Simor, István
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This research paper introduces the  EFU-HSW (Human Software)  framework, an extension of the Ecological Flux Unit methodology designed to audit educational systems. The study proposes an experimental protocol to model the metabolic footprint of knowledge transfer by unifying physical energy use, cognitive load, and qualification entropy into a single flux-based scale. By defining metrics such as the  Sovereignty Gap  and  Metabolic Dignity , the framework provides a replicable scientific method to benchmark the efficiency of intellectual capital formation across different national educational models.
steps_raw: This research paper introduces the  EFU-HSW (Human Software)  framework, an extension of the Ecological Flux Unit methodology designed to audit educational systems. The study proposes an experimental protocol to model the metabolic footprint of knowledge transfer by unifying physical energy use, cognitive load, and qualification entropy into a single flux-based scale. By defining metrics such as the  Sovereignty Gap  and  Metabolic Dignity , the framework provides a replicable scientific method to benchmark the efficiency of intellectual capital formation across different national educational models.
